title: Deleted item can be deleted again without any error
excerpt:
We are using delete_item mutation to delete the item. However it is not giving any error when trying to delete same item again and again.  We are expecting error while deleting the item which is already deleted. 
Regards…

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using delete_item mutation to delete the item. However it is not giving any error when trying to delete same item again and again. We are expecting error while deleting the item which is already deleted.

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
